generated_oml:
instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors embedded in the lab-scale gantry crane for real-time state data acquisition"

]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational metrics of the gantry crane collected continuously for persistent storage and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

]

]

]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance GeneralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

    base:desc "GitHub repository for version control of digital twin development"

]
